Directorate of Administrative Affairs

Istanbul Galata University Directorate of Administrative Affairs meticulously plans and manages essential support services such as cleaning, transportation, security, and dining in alignment with the university’s mission, vision, and quality standards. The Directorate ensures these services are delivered economically and efficiently, utilizing available resources most effectively. It carries out the processes in Occupational Health and Safety (OHS) and Civil Defense. It is responsible for ensuring the follow-up of all services purchased within the administrative scope.
